use_cases: Displaying subscription plan options with pricing tiers
Comparing feature sets across Basic, Startup, and Enterprise plans
Highlighting the most popular pricing tier with visual badge
ai_summary: A responsive pricing section component featuring three pricing tiers (Basic, Startup, Enterprise) displayed in a grid layout. The component includes a radial gradient background with indigo tones and gradient text effects for the header. Each pricing card displays the plan name, description, price, and a list of features. The 'most popular' plan is indicated via a prop flag, suitable for SaaS and subscription-based applications requiring plan comparison interfaces.
